title: oxytropis ochrantha subsp. diversicolor
intro: Oxytropis ochrantha subsp. diversicolor, also known as a type of plant species in the Fabaceae family, is a flowering perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxytropis ochrantha subsp. diversicolor include its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into a powder or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
